description: Makes HTTP requests to external APIs and services. Supports all standard methods with custom headers, authentication, and body.

requiredFields.label: URL
requiredFields.description: The full URL of the API endpoint to call

optionalFields.label: HTTP Method
optionalFields.description: The HTTP method for the request

optionalFields.label: Headers
optionalFields.description: Custom HTTP headers as key-value pairs

optionalFields.label: Request Body
optionalFields.description: The request body to send (for POST, PUT, PATCH)

optionalFields.label: Authentication Type
optionalFields.description: The authentication method for the API

optionalFields.label: Query Parameters
optionalFields.description: URL query parameters as key-value pairs

outputs.label: Status Code
outputs.description: The HTTP status code of the response

outputs.label: Response Body
outputs.description: The response body from the API
